name: SCDType2DeltaMerge
description: It is a Delta merge operation that stores and manages both current and historical data over time.

fields.name: targetLocation
fields.title: Target Delta Path
fields.description: Delta Path of the target location

fields.name: active_flag_col
fields.title: Active Flag Column
fields.description: Used to mark which record is the current active one.

fields.name: start_date_col
fields.title: Start Date Column Name
fields.description: Column Name when a particular version of a record became valid or active

fields.name: end_date_col
fields.title: End Date Column Name
fields.description: Column Name when a particular version of a record became invalid or inactive

fields.name: start_date_val
fields.title: Start Date Column Value
fields.description: date value for particular version of a record became valid or active

fields.name: end_date_val
fields.title: End Date Column Value
fields.description: date value for a particular version of a record became valid or active
